name: Spell Scroll (1st Level)
description: A spell scroll bears the words of a single spell, written in a mystical cipher. If the spell is on your class's spell list, you can use an action to read the scroll and cast its spell without having to provide any material components. Otherwise, the scroll is illegible to you. A spell scroll fades to nonexistence after the spell is cast. If the spell is on a class's spell list but of a higher level than you can normally cast, you must make an ability check using your spellcasting ability to determine whether you cast it successfully. The DC equals 10 + the spell's level. On a failed check, the spell disappears from the scroll with no other effect.

spell.note: Variable - this is a template for any 1st-level spell

usage.consumption: Scroll fades after spell is cast
usage.ability_check: Required if spell is above character's casting level (DC 10 + spell level)

activation.description: Use an action to read the scroll and cast the spell

notes: Spell scrolls come in levels 1-9. A character must have the spell on their class spell list to read it without a check (unless higher level). Scrolls are excellent rewards for treasure and one-time solutions to problems.
